title: Square Location
description: Represents one of a business's locations where transactions occur, inventory is managed, and team members work.

id.description: A short generated string of letters and numbers that uniquely identifies this location instance.

name.description: The name of the location. This information appears in the Seller Dashboard as the nickname. A location name must be unique within a seller account.

address.description: The physical address of the location.

address_line_1.description: The first line of the address.

address_line_2.description: The second line of the address, if any.

address_line_3.description: The third line of the address, if any.

locality.description: The city or town of the address.

sublocality.description: A civil region within the address's locality, if any.

administrative_district_level_1.description: A civil entity within the address's country. In the US, this is the state.

country.description: The address's country, in the two-letter format of ISO 3166.

timezone.description: The IANA time zone identifier for the time zone of the location. For example, America/Los_Angeles.

capabilities.description: The Square features that are enabled for the location.

created_at.description: The time when the location was created, in RFC 3339 format.

merchant_id.description: The ID of the merchant that owns the location.

country.description: The country of the location, in the two-letter format of ISO 3166. For example, US or JP.

language_code.description: The language associated with the location, in BCP 47 format.

currency.description: The currency used for all transactions at this location, in ISO 4217 format. For example, USD.

phone_number.description: The phone number of the location. For example, +1 855-700-6000.

business_name.description: The name of the location's overall business. This name is present on receipts and other customer-facing branding.

website_url.description: The website URL of the location.

business_hours.description: The hours of operation for the location.

day_of_week.description: The day of the week for this time period.

start_local_time.description: The start time of a business hours period, specified in local time using partial-time RFC 3339 format. For example, 08:30:00.

end_local_time.description: The end time of a business hours period, specified in local time using partial-time RFC 3339 format. For example, 21:00:00.

periods.description: The list of time periods during which the location is open.

business_email.description: The email address of the location.

description.description: The description of the location. For example, Main Street location.

twitter_username.description: The Twitter username of the location without the '@' symbol.

instagram_username.description: The Instagram username of the location without the '@' symbol.

facebook_url.description: The Facebook profile URL of the location.

coordinates.description: The physical coordinates (latitude and longitude) of the location.

latitude.description: The latitude coordinate of the location.

longitude.description: The longitude coordinate of the location.

logo_url.description: The URL of the logo image for the location.

pos_background_url.description: The URL of the Point of Sale background image for the location.

mcc.description: The merchant category code (MCC) of the location as standardized by ISO 18245.

full_format_logo_url.description: The URL of a full-format logo image for the location.

tax_ids.description: The tax IDs for this location.

eu_vat.description: The EU VAT number for this location.

fr_siret.description: The SIRET number for this location (France).

fr_naf.description: The NAF code for this location (France).

es_nif.description: The NIF number for this location (Spain).
